description: You are logged into 2N Access Commander at https://localhost:9443 as admin (password: 2n). During a recent bulk import, three users (Okafor Sandra, Webb Marcus, and Zhang Mei-Ling) had their first and last names mapped backwards. Correct the field mapping for these specific profiles so that Sandra, Marcus, and Mei-Ling are the First Names and Okafor, Webb, and Zhang are the Last Names. Do not delete and recreate the accounts, and do not modify any other users.
